articles.title: Heatwaves grip Howrah #Gallery - Social News XYZ
articles.full_text:
Howrah: Women shield themselves with an umbrella amid sweltering heatwave conditions in Howrah district of West Bengal on Thursday, June 04, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
Howrah: A toddler uses a cloth to shield himself from the blazing sun while sitting on his father’s lap amid sweltering heatwave conditions in Howrah district of West Bengal on Thursday, June 04, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
Howrah: A child drinks packed juice seeking relief from the sweltering heatwave conditions in Howrah district of West Bengal on Thursday, June 04, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
Howrah: A man splashes water on himself amid sweltering heatwave conditions in Howrah district of West Bengal on Thursday, June 04, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
